examples: Twas she that hath disturbed your Highness.
Lord Hertford said, "So please your highness, it is for you to command, it is for us to obey."
The soldier brought his halberd to a present-arms and said mockingly, "I salute your gracious Highness."
Your Highness is an odd-looking Medieval stoner flick which co-stars James Franco and Danny McBride.
His Royal Highness the Duke of Gloucester will lead a special ceremony at the church.
